item.title: Shafilea Ahmed: They Did This to Their Daughter for "HONOUR"
item.description:
Shafilea Ahmed was a bright and ambitious teenager with dreams of choosing her own future. But she faced intense pressure from her family over her desire to live independently and reject a forced marriage. In 2003, the 17-year-old disappeared, and for years her fate remained a mystery until the truth about what happened inside her own home finally came to light.
This video explores the timeline of Shafilea's disappearance, the investigation, and the evidence that ultimately brought those responsible to justice, while reflecting on the wider issues of coercive control, family violence, and the importance of protecting vulnerable young people.
Do you think enough is being done to protect young people who speak out about abuse or fear within their own families?

media:content.media:title: Shafilea Ahmed: They Did This to Their Daughter for "HONOUR"
media:content.media:description:
Shafilea Ahmed was a bright and ambitious teenager with dreams of choosing her own future. But she faced intense pressure from her family over her desire to live independently and reject a forced marriage. In 2003, the 17-year-old disappeared, and for years her fate remained a mystery until the truth about what happened inside her own home finally came to light.
This video explores the timeline of Shafilea's disappearance, the investigation, and the evidence that ultimately brought those responsible to justice, while reflecting on the wider issues of coercive control, family violence, and the importance of protecting vulnerable young people.
Do you think enough is being done to protect young people who speak out about abuse or fear within their own families?

item.title: The Truth About This Stepfather Was Worse Than Anyone Expected
item.description:
Ten-month-old Jacob Crouch should have been surrounded by love and safety. Instead, prosecutors told the court he endured months of repeated abuse before suffering a fatal assault that claimed his life in December 2020. His stepfather, Craig Crouch, was found guilty of his murder, while Jacob's mother, Gemma Barton, was cleared of murder. The heartbreaking case raised difficult questions about child protection, missed warning signs, and how prolonged abuse can remain hidden behind closed doors.
Do you think more could have been done to recognize the warning signs and protect Jacob before it was too late?

media:content.media:title: The Truth About This Stepfather Was Worse Than Anyone Expected
media:content.media:description:
Ten-month-old Jacob Crouch should have been surrounded by love and safety. Instead, prosecutors told the court he endured months of repeated abuse before suffering a fatal assault that claimed his life in December 2020. His stepfather, Craig Crouch, was found guilty of his murder, while Jacob's mother, Gemma Barton, was cleared of murder. The heartbreaking case raised difficult questions about child protection, missed warning signs, and how prolonged abuse can remain hidden behind closed doors.
Do you think more could have been done to recognize the warning signs and protect Jacob before it was too late?
